titleStmt.title: SII 20.201: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 201. (B.K. No. 39 of 1937-38.) KAPPANIṀBARGI, INDI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken Nandi pillar lying in front of the temple of Hanumān.

summary.p: This damaged and fragmentary record is dated Śaka [116]5, Śōbhakṛit, Āshāḍha, Monday, Dakshiṇāyana—Saṁkrānti. The tithi is lost. The details correspond to A.D. 1243, July 27, Monday. The Saṁkramaṇa occurred on the following day.

The inscription seems to record the gift of a village (name lost) made for the benefit of the temple of Kapilasiddha [Mallikārjunadēva] of Sonnalige by Mahāpradhāna Mādhavadēva-nāyaka and his son Kēśavadēva-nāyaka governing from rājadhāni Uṁmaḍe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pratāpacakravarti śrī siṁghaṇadēva vijayarājyamuthe beginning is worn out.
pravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamirddu śrīmatu
1165 neya sōbhakrutu saṁvatsarada Āsāḍa
sōmavāra dakṣaṇāyana saṁkramaṇa vyatīpātadaṁdu
svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanu mahāpradhānaṁ bāhattarani
yōgādhipati sakaḷa pati dēśādhipati niyōgayōgaṁdhara
ryyadhuraṁdharanativiṣamayahārūḍhapra khārēvaṁ
baḷatritātaṁ koṁkaṇōrvvīpāḷagarvvasarvvarsvasūṟekāṟaṁ śrī
dēvarājyavārddivarddhanasudhākaranumappa śrīmatu
dhikāri mādhavadēvanāyakaruṁ tatuputra kēsavadēva
nāyakaruṁ samastataṁtrasahitavāgi śrīmadrājadhāni Uṁmaḍeya
yalu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ māḍuttirddu . ©
matu jaṁbudvīpaśikhāmaṇi dakṣiṇavāraṇāsi Abhinava
śrī soṁnalageyapurada śrīmanu mahāmahima śrī kapilasi
dēvara Āṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōga khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrnnōddhāra Aṁ
kkaṁ dhūpadīpanivēdyakkaṁ taṟikāḍamūnūṟa
ḷi Eṁṭubāḍada baḷiya bāḍagaḍiya bāḍada niṁ
ha sama(ṁ)nvitaṁ nidhinidhānanikṣēpajalapāśāṇavikṣa
saṁyuktaṁ sulka sāda daṁḍa maulika kāru
gi sakaḷadravyārjjitaṁ sahitavāgi śrī
hasadiṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭa
saluttaviralu maṁgaḷa mahā śrī
vā yō harēti vasuṁdarāṁ śaṣṭirvvarśasa
krimi .
Digital edition of SII 20.201 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
